name: Niagen Bioscience, Inc.
business: Niagen Bioscience, Inc. sells proprietary nicotinamide riboside (NR) ingredients and finished dietary supplements under the Tru Niagen brand to support NAD+ levels and healthy aging. The company also supplies pharmaceutical-grade Niagen to FDA-registered 503B outsourcing facilities for compounding into IV and injectable formulations, and is pursuing pharmaceutical development of NAD+ precursors for rare diseases.
sellsTo: Direct-to-consumer through proprietary e-commerce platforms and third-party online marketplaces
International strategic partners (e.g., A.S. Watson Group) for brick-and-mortar and online distribution
Manufacturers of consumer products for food-grade Niagen ingredient
U.S. FDA-registered 503B outsourcing facilities and compounding pharmacies abroad for pharmaceutical-grade Niagen

exposures.sentence: We are a global bioscience company dedicated to promoting healthy aging. In 2017, we expanded our offerings with the launch of Tru Niagen , a finished dietary supplement featuring Niagen , available directly to consumers.

We supply food-grade Niagen as a raw material to manufacturers of consumer products and pharmaceutical-grade Niagen to U.S. FDA-registered 503B outsourcing facilities, in each case in accordance with applicable regulatory requirements.
We market and distribute Tru Niagen products primarily through proprietary e-commerce platforms, third-party online marketplaces, and strategic distribution partners.
Pharmaceutical Segment We are pursuing pharmaceutical development of NAD+ precursors for potential therapeutic applications in advanced aging rare diseases.

catalysts.event: Sale of analytical reference standards and services segment
catalysts.sentence: On February 24, 2026, we entered into a definitive asset purchase agreement with a third party to sell substantially all of the assets of this operating segment for total consideration of approximately $6.0 million, less working capital adjustments of approximately $0.2 million.
On November 6, 2025, our board of directors approved a share repurchase program (the Share Repurchase Program ) authorizing the Company to repurchase up to $10.0 million of its common stock.

tamClaims.claim: Global wellness industry market was approximately $6.8 trillion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data from Global Wellness Institute, the global wellness industry market was approximately $6.8 trillion in 2024, nearly 8% higher than its size in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Global dietary supplements market size estimated at $193 billion in 2024, expected to grow at 8.9% CAGR from 2025 to 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data from Grand View Research, the global dietary supplements market size was estimated at $193 billion in 2024, and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 8.9% from 2025 to 2033 and the intravenous hydration therapy market size was estimated at $3 billion in 2024, and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 9.0% from 2025 to 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Intravenous hydration therapy market size estimated at $3 billion in 2024, expected to grow at 9.0% CAGR from 2025 to 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: According to data from Grand View Research, the global dietary supplements market size was estimated at $193 billion in 2024, and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 8.9% from 2025 to 2033 and the intravenous hydration therapy market size was estimated at $3 billion in 2024, and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 9.0% from 2025 to 2033.
